sections.name:
WARNING
On AP 0.6.7 Dexsanity Encounter Types are bugged.
Only Pokémon you can find in included types are checks,
but the logical access could be an excluded type.
This is fixed in the 3.0.0 beta.

Also, that setting does not auto-track in AP 0.6.7.
So you need to change it yourself.
